title: spermacoce commutata
intro: Spermacoce commutata, also known as the bitter buttons plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Spermacoce commutata are said to include the relief of fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Spermacoce commutata is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, and it may also be used in herbal remedies in the form of infusions or decoctions.
